mission: Define the canonical release-candidate freeze and publication-parity strategy so promoted runtime truth stays pinned to one approval tuple, one runtime publication bundle, and one exact parity verdict before any writable or calmly trustworthy surface could remain live.

tupleStripStages.label: Candidate
tupleStripStages.summary: Frozen git ref plus artifact digests

tupleStripStages.label: Freeze
tupleStripStages.summary: Approved review, baseline, policy, schema, and bridge tuple

tupleStripStages.label: Publication
tupleStripStages.summary: Runtime bundle plus provenance and surface publication refs

tupleStripStages.label: Parity
tupleStripStages.summary: Exact or fail-closed comparison against the approved tuple

tupleStripStages.label: Watch
tupleStripStages.summary: Published watch tuple and observation policy for every wave step

parityRules.summary: Artifacts, policies, schemas, bridge capabilities, migration posture, immutable baseline, review package, and standards watchlist promote and roll back as one tuple.
parityRules.blockingEffect: If any member drifts, approval freeze expires and the candidate cannot advance.

parityRules.summary: Runtime publication, surface publications, runtime bindings, provenance, and parity are published together as one runtime truth bundle.
parityRules.blockingEffect: Hidden CI-only state, ad hoc dashboard joins, or route-local cache cannot replace published parity.

parityRules.summary: ReleasePublicationParityRecord(parityState = exact) is mandatory before writable or calmly trustworthy posture may remain live.
parityRules.blockingEffect: Stale, conflict, withdrawn, or missing parity suppresses mutation before any local cache or deploy-green signal can reopen it.

parityRules.summary: Watch, widen, pause, rollback, and recovery decisions must read ReleaseWatchTuple and WaveObservationPolicy rather than operator memory or dashboard interpretation.
parityRules.blockingEffect: Stale or superseded watch tuples block widening, calm watch posture, and governed handoff.

assumptions.statement: Seq_051 publishes one canonical candidate per environment ring until later wave-cohort tasks mint tenant-specific release manifests.
Exact publication parity proves tuple coherence only. Seq_050 design-publication and accessibility ceilings still prevent publishable_live browser posture.
Environment-scoped channel manifest refs from seq_046 remain the authoritative bridge-floor anchors until dedicated channel release tasks publish richer channel manifests.

defects.title: Release, settlement, and trust controls no longer float as phase-local conventions
defects.summary: Seq_051 binds release candidate, approval freeze, runtime publication, parity, and watch posture into one machine-readable tuple lineage.

defects.title: Governance watch surfaces now bind parity and recovery posture
defects.summary: Watch tuples and observation policies now consume the exact parity verdict and recovery set instead of dashboard commentary.

defects.title: Freeze tuple now binds reviewed baseline and standards watchlist
defects.summary: Governance review package hash, standards watchlist hash, and compilation tuple all ride inside one approval freeze.

defects.title: Watch tuples now require recovery and continuity posture
defects.summary: Wave control is no longer allowed to widen on parity-only or dashboard-only evidence.

defects.title: Design publication cannot drift outside the release tuple
defects.summary: Design bundle refs and lint verdict refs are now part of the freeze and runtime publication comparisons.

defects.title: Seq_050 browser ceilings still constrain live posture
defects.summary: Exact parity is now machine-readable, but design publication and accessibility completeness still need later closure before calm live browser posture is legal.

reasonCatalog.title: Build provenance is quarantined
reasonCatalog.summary: Quarantined provenance blocks runtime consumption even if the bundle still exists.

reasonCatalog.title: Runtime publication was withdrawn
reasonCatalog.summary: A withdrawn runtime publication bundle cannot remain the source of truth for browser or wave posture.

reasonCatalog.title: Governance watch parity conflicts
reasonCatalog.summary: Governance and operations are no longer reading the same parity and recovery tuple.

reasonCatalog.title: Recovery disposition set drifted
reasonCatalog.summary: Route recovery posture no longer matches the approved release tuple, so watch and browser truth cannot stay green.

reasonCatalog.title: Route contract digest set drifted
reasonCatalog.summary: The published route-contract digest set no longer matches the matrix frozen at approval.

reasonCatalog.title: Topology tuple conflicts with approval
reasonCatalog.summary: The runtime publication bundle resolved a different topology tuple hash than the one approved in the freeze.

reasonCatalog.title: Watch evidence was not refreshed
reasonCatalog.summary: Observation policy or continuity evidence still points at an older parity generation.

reasonCatalog.title: Watch tuple was superseded
reasonCatalog.summary: The current wave depends on a newer watch tuple, so prior rollout evidence is no longer authoritative.

bindingCeilingReasons: Design contract publication remains planned in seq_050, so exact tuple parity still resolves to non-live browser posture.
Accessibility coverage remains degraded in seq_050 and therefore blocks calmly trustworthy publication.
Exact preview parity proves tuple coherence, but design publication and complete accessibility coverage remain prerequisites for calm trust.
Stale route or recovery publication forces the same-shell surfaces back to read_only or recovery_only even when compiled code still exists.
Provenance quarantine and topology conflict collapse every writable route to blocked or governed recovery posture before canary.
Withdrawn publication or superseded watch tuples mean route-local cache and deploy health cannot reopen writable posture.

freezeTupleMatrix.label: Artifacts
freezeTupleMatrix.fail_closed_effect: Unsigned or drifted artifacts block promotion and rollback reuse immediately.

freezeTupleMatrix.label: Topology
freezeTupleMatrix.fail_closed_effect: Topology drift freezes writable posture and blocks widen or resume.

freezeTupleMatrix.label: Manifests
freezeTupleMatrix.fail_closed_effect: Any stale or withdrawn manifest collapses browser authority to recovery or blocked posture.

freezeTupleMatrix.label: Design bundles
freezeTupleMatrix.fail_closed_effect: Design publication drift blocks calm trust even if runtime parity still matches.

freezeTupleMatrix.label: Schemas
freezeTupleMatrix.fail_closed_effect: Schema drift invalidates parity and forces a fresh freeze before promotion.

freezeTupleMatrix.label: Migrations
freezeTupleMatrix.fail_closed_effect: Backfill or read-path compatibility drift blocks widening and candidate reuse.

freezeTupleMatrix.label: Provenance
freezeTupleMatrix.fail_closed_effect: Quarantined, revoked, or withdrawn provenance freezes mutating posture before deploy calmness can lie.

freezeTupleMatrix.label: Recovery and watch
freezeTupleMatrix.fail_closed_effect: Watch drift or missing recovery posture blocks widening and governed handoff.

watchRequiredEvidence.blocking_effect: Promotion, resume, and writable posture stop if the approved freeze expires or drifts.
No runtime publication means no live authority, regardless of deployment dashboards.
Wave widening and calm trust block unless parity remains exact.
Scope and guardrail drift supersede the tuple and force a fresh wave publication.
Operators cannot shorten, extend, or replace dwell obligations from memory or chat.
Resume, widen, and recovery activation halt on constrained or blocked rollback readiness.
